children.text:
Bible Gateway is a tool for reading and researching Scripture, and now it's on your Android device! Slide your finger to the left to set your preferences and take the tour, or just press Skip This Tour to dive right in.

You can always add or change your settings later. You may also access this tour any time from the Settings panel.

We want to be sure that your experience with the Bible is tailored just for you. Please select your preferred translation and font size below. Other settings like red lettering and annotations can be changed in Settings.
